plan_validation.digest_definition: sha256 of sorted relative-path per-file sha256 lines under plugin-plans/system-dev-planner, excluding .gate/, .claude/, plan-findings.json, elegant-verification-30.json, verification-state.json

lifecycle_execution.meaning: P01-P13 and task nodes are not executed by this L3 plan validation

build_execution.meaning: L4 build cannot start until contract-only executors are resolved

freshness_policy: Any change to a digest input makes this receipt stale and requires derive-task-graph, deterministic gates, evaluator, schema fixtures, and 30-method review to run again.
